sqlMap.select: select defaultview, startday, starttime, endtime, autodelete from tbl_scheduleconfig where userid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select distinct a.groupid as groupid, groupname, '' as description, '' as createdate from tbl_schedulegroup a left join tbl_schedulegroupmember b on a.groupid = b.groupid and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where (creatorid = #v_USERID# or ( memberid = #v_USERID# and status = 1 )) and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# order by groupname

select scheduleid, parentid, ownerid, ownername, ownername2, date_add(a.createdate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as createdate, a.creatorid, a.creatorname, a.creatorname2, a.createdate, modifierid, modifiername, modifiername2, date_add(a.modifydate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as modifydate, scheduletype, importance, hasattendant, hasattach, hascomment, isreadonly, ispublic, datetype, date_add(a.startdate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as startdate, date_add(a.enddate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as enddate, repetition, repetitiondelete, title, location, contentpath, groupname from tbl_schedule a left join tbl_schedulegroup b on a.ownerid = b.groupid and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where a.scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select scheduleid, parentid, ownerid, ownername, ownername2, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, date_add(createdate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as createdate, modifierid, modifiername, modifiername2, date_add(modifydate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as modifydate, scheduletype, importance, hasattendant, hasattach, hascomment, isreadonly, ispublic, datetype, date_add(startdate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as startdate, date_add(enddate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as enddate, repetition, repetitiondelete, title, location, contentpath, '' as groupname from tbl_schedule where ownerid in ($v_PIDLIST$) and ( (startdate >= #v_PSTARTDATE# and startdate <= #v_PENDDATE#) or (ENDDATE >= #v_PSTARTDATE# and enddate < #v_PENDDATE#) or (startdate < #v_PSTARTDATE# and enddate >= #v_PENDDATE#) or (datetype='3') ) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
$v_PFILTER$ like concat('%',#v_PKEYWORD#,'%') order by startdate asc
select groupid, groupname, description, createdate from tbl_schedulegroup where creatorid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# order by groupname

select count(*) from ( select memberid, tenant_id from tbl_schedulegroupmember where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# )a join tbl_usermaster b on a.memberid = b.cn and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where b.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select a.memberid, '' as membername, '' as membername2, '' as status, '' as responsedate, b.mail, case #v_LANG# when '1' then concat(b.displayname, '(', description, ')') when '2' then concat(b.displayname2, '(', description2, ')') end info from ( select memberid, tenant_id from tbl_schedulegroupmember where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# )a join tbl_usermaster b on a.memberid = b.cn and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where b.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select memberid, membername, membername2, status, date_add(responsedate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as responsedate, '' as mail, '' as info from tbl_schedulegroupmember where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select cn, case #v_LANG# when '1' then displayname when '2' then displayname2 end displayname, displayname2, case #v_LANG# when '1' then description when '2' then description2 end description, description2, title , title2 , telephonenumber from tbl_usermaster where
department in ( select cn from tbl_deptmaster where dept_cd_path like concat('%',#v_DEPTID#,'%') and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# )
department = #v_DEPTID#
and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# order by description
select lunaruse from tbl_lunaruse where usecompany = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
select previoslyregiuse from tbl_previoslyregi where usecompany = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
select secretaryid , secretaryname from tbl_secretary where userid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# order by secretaryname
select userid as secretaryid, case #v_LANG# when '1' then username when '2' then username2 end secretaryname from tbl_secretary where secretaryid = #v_CN# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
select departmentcn as deptid, case #v_LANG# when '1' then departmentname when '2' then departmentname2 end deptname from tbl_schedule_public_dept where usercn = #v_CN# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select deptid, case #v_LANG# when '1' then b.displayname when '2' then b.displayname2 end title from tbl_addjobmaster a join tbl_deptmaster b on a.deptid = b.cn and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where a.cn = #v_CN# and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
select count(attendantid) from tbl_attendant where attendantid = #v_USERID# and ( status = 0 or status = 3 ) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select count(a.groupid) from tbl_schedulegroup a join tbl_schedulegroupmember b on a.groupid = b.groupid and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where memberid = #v_USERID# and ( status = 0 or status = 3 ) and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
select count(1) from tbl_attendant where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select attendantid, attendantname, attendantname2, attendantdeptname, attendantdeptname2, status, date_add(responsedate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as responsedate from tbl_attendant where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# order by attendantname
select attachid, filesize, filename, filepath from tbl_scheduleattach where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: select holidayid, holidayname, holidayname2, holidaydate, ifnull(issolar, '0') issolar, ifnull(isrepeat, '0') isrepeat, ifnull(isuse, '0') isuse, ifnull(isrest, '0') isrest, usecompany from tbl_holidaylist where tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

isNotEqual.isEqual: select holidayid, holidayname, holidayname2, holidaydate, ifnull(issolar, '0') issolar, ifnull(isrepeat, '0') isrepeat, ifnull(isuse, '0') isuse, ifnull(isrest, '0') isrest, usecompany from tbl_holidaylist where (usecompany = '1' or usecompany = #v_USERCOMPANY#) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: select holidayid, holidayname, holidayname2, holidaydate, ifnull(issolar, '0') issolar, ifnull(isrepeat, '0') isrepeat, ifnull(isuse, '0') isuse, ifnull(isrest, '0') isrest, usecompany from tbl_holidaylist where usecompany = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

sqlMap.select: select last_insert_id()
select count(1) from tbl_rs_schedule where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
select date_format(date_add(startDate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute), '%Y-%m-%d') as startDate from tbl_schedulerepetition_del where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

select b.scheduleid as scheduleid, a.status as status, date_add(a.responsedate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as responsedate, b.creatorid as creatorid, b.creatorname as creatorname, b.creatorname2 as creatorname2, b.title as title, b.location as location, b.datetype as datetype, date_add(b.startdate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as startdate, date_add(b.enddate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as enddate from tbl_attendant a join tbl_schedule b on a.scheduleid = b.scheduleid and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where a.attendantid = #v_USERID# and ( a.status = 0 or a.status = 3 ) and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# order by a.responsedate desc

select a.groupid as groupid, groupname, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, description, status, date_add(responsedate, interval +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as responsedate from tbl_schedulegroup a join tbl_schedulegroupmember b on a.groupid = b.groupid and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where memberid = #v_USERID# and (status = 0 or status = 3) and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# order by groupname
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_schedule( parentid, ownerid, ownername, ownername2, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, createdate, modifierid, modifiername, modifiername2, modifydate, scheduletype, importance, hasattendant, hasattach, hascomment, isreadonly, ispublic, datetype, startdate, enddate, repetition, repetitiondelete, title, location, contentpath, tenant_id ) values ( 0, #v_OWNERID#, #v_OWNERNAME#, #v_OWNERNAME2#, #v_CREATORID#, #v_CREATORNAME#, #v_CREATORNAME2#, utc_timestamp(), #v_CREATORID#, #v_CREATORNAME#, #v_CREATORNAME2#, utc_timestamp(), #v_SCHEDULETYPE#, #v_IMPORTANCE#, #v_HASATTENDANT#, #v_HASATTACH#, 'N', 'N', #v_ISPUBLIC#, #v_DATETYPE#, #v_STARTDATE#, #v_ENDDATE#, ifnull(#v_REPETITION#, ''), '', #v_TITLE#, ifnull(#v_LOCATION#, ''), #v_CONTENTPATH#, #v_TENANTID# )

insert into tbl_attendant( scheduleid, attendantid, attendantname, attendantname2, attendantdeptname, attendantdeptname2, status, tenant_id, responsedate ) values ( #v_SCHEDULEID#, #v_ATTENDANTID#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME2#, #v_ATTENDANTDEPTNAME#, #v_ATTENDANTDEPTNAME2#, 0, #v_TENANTID#, utc_timestamp() )

insert into tbl_schedule( parentid, ownerid, ownername, ownername2, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, createdate, modifierid, modifiername, modifiername2, modifydate, scheduletype, importance, hasattendant, hasattach, hascomment, isreadonly, ispublic, datetype, startdate, enddate, repetition, repetitiondelete, title, location, contentpath, tenant_id ) ( select #v_SCHEDULEID#, #v_ATTENDANTID#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME2#, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, createdate, modifierid, modifiername, modifiername2, modifydate, scheduletype, importance, hasattendant, hasattach, hascomment, 'Y', ispublic, datetype, startdate, enddate, repetition, repetitiondelete, title, location, contentpath, tenant_id from tbl_schedule where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.update: update tbl_schedule set modifierid = #v_MODIFIERID#, modifiername = #v_MODIFIERNAME#, modifiername2 = #v_MODIFIERNAME2#, modifydate = utc_timestamp(), importance = #v_IMPORTANCE#, hasattach = #v_HASATTACH#, ispublic = #v_ISPUBLIC#, datetype = #v_DATETYPE#, startdate = #v_STARTDATE#, enddate = #v_ENDDATE#, repetition = ifnull(#v_REPETITION#, ''), title = #v_TITLE#, location = ifnull(#v_LOCATION#, '') where (scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# or parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID#) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
update tbl_schedulegroupmember set status = #v_STATUS#, responsedate = utc_timestamp() where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and memberid = #v_MEMBERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
update tbl_schedule set hasattendant = #v_HASATTENDANT# where (scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# or parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID#) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
update tbl_attendant set status = #v_STATUS#, responsedate = utc_timestamp() where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and attendantid = #v_ATTENDANTID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_schedulegroup where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_schedulerepetition_del where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_schedulegroupmember where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_schedulegroupmember where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and memberid = #v_MEMBERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_scheduleconfig where userid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_secretary where userid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_scheduleattach where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_attendant where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_schedule where (scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# or parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID#) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_rs_schedule where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_attendant where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and attendantid = #v_ATTENDANTID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_schedule where parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and ownerid = #v_ATTENDANTID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
